headline: Solstice Advanced Mat Bets on AI Demand With $14.5B Element Solutions Deal
summary: Solstice Advanced Mat (NASDAQ:SOLS) announced an agreement to acquire Element Solutions in a cash-and-stock transaction valued at approximately $14.5 billion, including the assumption of net debt, executives said on a conference call discussing the deal.
